channel.title: transformer on Fei Li's Website
channel.description: Recent content in transformer on Fei Li's Website

item.title: Better Transformers
item.description: In this post we will look at several techniques that are commonly employed in many popular open source large language models (LLMs) today, for example Llama, ChatGLM2-6B, Qwen-7B and Baichuan-7B. Specifically, we will talk about two layers, SwiGLU and RMSNorm; two position embedding methods: Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) and ALiBi; and finally a technique for scaling attention calculation to long sequences – Flash Attention. We will use Llama source code as example implementation, and in the end we will walk through the rest of Llama’s source code.
